incorrect_examples.task:
Create a Linkedin update post suggesting you got a job promotion and are now a Senior Associate at McKinsey.
Only use http://linkedin.com to achieve the task. Don't go to any other site. The task is achievable with just navigation from this site.

reasoning.create_content: To create a post announcing the job promotion.
reasoning.add_job_experience: To add the new Senior Associate role at McKinsey to the user's profile.

incorrect_examples.raw_response:
(create_content, "To create a post announcing the job promotion.")
(add_job_experience, "To add the new Senior Associate role at McKinsey to the user's profile.")
